name: ai-project-kickoff
description: Standard process for in-house AI projects: run requirements gathering, capture decisions as granular working markdown in docs/ (the source of truth), and render the Tecman-branded document package (.docx) from that markdown at each review gate (PoC and production). Gate-aware taxonomy with the LLD at the PoC gate. Provides the /new-ai-project and /render-gate-package commands, the ai-poc-docs skill, a discovery agent (reasoning model) for the requirements phase, and a gate-renderer agent (Sonnet) for cost-efficient document generation. Requires the tecman-docx plugin for rendering.
